checks.description: Seconds counter increments by 1 each clock cycle and wraps from 59 to 0.
checks.pass_condition: On each rising edge of CLK when RST is deasserted, Secs either increments by 1 (if previous value < 59) or becomes 0 (if previous value == 59).
checks.trigger_condition: When CLK rises and RST is low.

checks.description: Minutes counter increments by 1 when seconds wrap from 59 to 0, otherwise holds.
checks.pass_condition: On each rising edge of CLK when RST is deasserted, if previous Secs == 59 then Mins increments (if previous Mins < 59) or becomes 0 (if previous Mins == 59); otherwise Mins stays unchanged.
checks.trigger_condition: When CLK rises and RST is low.

checks.description: Hours counter increments by 1 when minutes and seconds both wrap from 59 to 0, otherwise holds.
checks.pass_condition: On each rising edge of CLK when RST is deasserted, if previous Secs == 59 and previous Mins == 59 then Hours increments (if previous Hours < 23) or becomes 0 (if previous Hours == 23); otherwise Hours stays unchanged.
checks.trigger_condition: When CLK rises and RST is low.

checks.pass_condition: When RST is asserted (high) any time, Hours, Mins, and Secs become 0 and remain 0 until RST is deasserted.
